ddls:
CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "case_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case of violation */,
  "citation_number" INTEGER /* Citation number assigned by regulatory body */,
  "mine_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the mine where the violation occurred */,
  "penalty_paid" REAL /* Amount of penalty actually paid */,
  "proposed_penalty" REAL /* Proposed penalty amount */,
  "standard_violated" TEXT /* Safety standard that was violated */,
  "standard_violated_url" TEXT /* URL to the standard violated */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date when the violation occurred */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the violation */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who reported the violation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the violation (e.g., open, closed, under review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_mine_id FOREIGN KEY ("mine_id") REFERENCES mines ("mine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mines" (
  "mine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mine */,
  "mine_name" TEXT /* Name of the mine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the mine */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the mine */,
  "mine_type" TEXT /* Type of mine (e.g., surface, underground) */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the mine opened */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last safety inspection */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of safety inspections (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety standard */,
  "standard_number" TEXT /* Standard number as defined by regulatory bodies */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the safety standard */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full text of the safety standard */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body that enforces the standard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the standard was last updated */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Whether the standard is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty record */,
  "case_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the case of the violation */,
  "penalty_amount" REAL /* Amount of the penalty imposed */,
  "penalty_date" TEXT /* Date when the penalty was imposed */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the penalty was paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_case_number FOREIGN KEY ("case_number") REFERENCES violations ("case_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., safety officer, compliance manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "mine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mine for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Overall status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who generated the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the compliance status */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improving compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_mine_id FOREIGN KEY ("mine_id") REFERENCES mines ("mine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the action was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "mine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mine where the training took place */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic covered during the training */,
  "trainer" TEXT /* Name of the trainer conducting the session */,
  "number_of_attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees in the training session */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from attendees about the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_mine_id FOREIGN KEY ("mine_id") REFERENCES mines ("mine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "mine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mine where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident reported (e.g., injury, equipment failure) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was reported */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the incident */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_mine_id FOREIGN KEY ("mine_id") REFERENCES mines ("mine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_training_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who completed the training */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session attended */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the training was completed */,
  "certificate_number" TEXT /* Certificate number issued upon completion of the training */,
  "assessment_score" REAL /* Score obtained in the training assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_training_records_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_training_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
